action_set_definitions.name: get_portfolio_snapshot
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current cash balance and all asset holdings within the portfolio.

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current market prices and transaction fee details for assets.

symbols.description: List of asset symbols to query.

action_set_definitions.name: get_company_research
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves growth metrics, revenue data, and lead investor signals for a specific portfolio company.

symbol.description: The ticker or symbol of the company.

action_set_definitions.name: get_financing_notice
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the terms of the current financing round for a company, including the share price for the new investment.

symbol.description: The ticker or symbol of the company.

action_set_definitions.name: get_handbook_rules
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the investment allocation logic from the Venture Capital Portfolio Management handbook for specific categories.

allocation_logic.Breakout: Invest maximum allowable up to concentration limit

action_set_definitions.name: execute_follow_on_investment
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a purchase of additional shares in a company based on a USD amount.

symbol.description: The ticker or symbol of the company.

amount_usd.description: The total dollar amount to invest.

state_description.cash_balance: The amount of liquid currency available for purchasing assets.
state_description.holdings: A mapping of asset symbols to the quantity currently held in the portfolio.
state_description.market_prices: The current market price per unit for each supported asset symbol.
state_description.transaction_fee_percentage: The percentage fee applied to the total value of each trade (e.g., 0.001 for 0.1%).
state_description.timestamp: The current discrete time step of the simulation.
